HomePage.title: Welcome to UTaker Dashboard
HomePage.subtitle: Your powerful dashboard for data management.

GeneralSettingsPage.title: General Settings
GeneralSettingsPage.description: Manage your preferences and application settings.

languageAndRegion.label: Language & Region
languageAndRegion.description: Select your preferred app language and regional format.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose light, dark, or follow system.

AccountSettingsPage.title: Account Settings
AccountSettingsPage.description: Manage your exchange accounts and model provider accounts.

exchangeList.title: Exchange APIs
exchangeList.description: Manage your exchange API keys. Only one API can be active at a time.

modelProviderList.title: Model Service Providers
modelProviderList.description: Manage your LLM providers (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic).

dialog.title: Add Exchange API
dialog.description: Enter your exchange API credentials here.
dialog.ipWhitelistNote: For trading APIs, add {ip} to the IP whitelist. You can ignore this when adding read-only APIs only.

dialog.title: Add Model Provider
dialog.description: Configure your Large Language Model provider settings.

Modal.activateExchangeApiDescription: Activating this API will restart the monitoring service and stop other APIs.
Modal.activateModelProviderDescription: Activating this provider might affect running agents.
Modal.deactivateModelProviderDescription: Deactivating this provider may cause agents depending on it to stop working.
Modal.deleteExchangeApiDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.
Modal.deleteModelProviderDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.
Modal.activateExchangeApiWarning: Activating this API will automatically deactivate all other exchange APIs for your account and restart the monitoring service.
Modal.deleteExchangeApiWarning: This will permanently remove the API key configuration.
Modal.deleteModelProviderWarning: This will permanently remove the provider configuration.
